sections.title: When + will + subject + verb ...?
sections.rule: When + will + subject + verb ...? — вопрос о времени действия или состояния в Future Simple.

examples.en: When will you go there?
When will you be there next time?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl juː biː ðeə nekst taɪm?/
examples.ru: Когда ты будешь там в следующий раз?

examples.en: When will it be possible?
When will you be online?
When will you go to bed?
When will you arrive at the airport?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl juː əˈraɪv æt ði ˈeəpɔːt?/

examples.en: When will you go to the airport?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl juː ɡəʊ tə ði ˈeəpɔːt?/

examples.en: When will you be at the airport?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl juː biː æt ði ˈeəpɔːt?/

examples.en: When will we eat?
When will we have lunch?
When will we have dinner?
When will we have a rest?
When will you have a rest?
When will you have a break?
When will we have a break?
When will you finish your work?
When will we go swimming?
When will we go to the swimming pool?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl wiː ɡəʊ tə ðə ˈswɪmɪŋ puːl?/

examples.en: When will you visit us next time?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl juː ˈvɪzɪt ʌs nekst taɪm?/
examples.ru: Когда ты посетишь нас в следующий раз?

examples.en: When will you learn English?
When will we go to the sea?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl wiː ɡəʊ tə ðə siː?/

examples.en: When will you go to the beach?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl juː ɡəʊ tə ðə biːtʃ?/

examples.en: When will you be ready?
When will you be free?
When will you go to the United States?
examples.ipa: /wen wɪl juː ɡəʊ tə ðə juˌnaɪtɪd steɪts?/
examples.ru: Когда ты поедешь в Соединённые Штаты?

sections.title: Where + will + subject + verb ...?
sections.rule: Where + will + subject + verb ...? — вопрос о месте или направлении.

examples.en: Where will you live?
Where will you go now?
Where will you be tomorrow?
Where will you buy it?

sections.title: Why + will + subject + verb ...?
sections.rule: Why + will + subject + verb ...? — вопрос о причине или цели.

examples.en: Why will you go to that city?
examples.ipa: /waɪ wɪl juː ɡəʊ tə ðæt ˈsɪti?/
examples.ru: Зачем ты поедешь в тот город?

examples.en: Why will you stay at home?

sections.title: What / Who + will + subject + verb ...?
sections.rule: What / Who + will + subject + verb ...? — вопросы о предмете действия или о человеке.

examples.en: What will you do there?
What will you say?
What will he tell her?
What will we do tomorrow?
What will you do after school?
examples.ru: Что ты будешь делать после школы?

examples.en: What will you do after work?
examples.ru: Что ты будешь делать после работы?

examples.en: Who will be with you?

sections.title: How + will + subject + verb ...?
sections.rule: How + will + subject + verb ...? — вопрос о способе, результате или состоянии.

examples.en: How will it be?
How will it help me?
How will he live on this money?
examples.ipa: /haʊ wɪl hiː lɪv ɒn ðɪs ˈmʌni?/
examples.ru: Как он будет жить на эти деньги?

examples.en: How will it help us?

sections.title: How much / What time + will + subject + verb ...?
sections.rule: How much ...? — вопрос о цене. What time ...? — вопрос о точном времени.

examples.en: How much will it cost?
What time will you come home tomorrow?
examples.ipa: /wɒt taɪm wɪl juː kʌm həʊm təˈmɒrəʊ?/
examples.ru: Во сколько ты придёшь домой завтра?

examples.en: What time will you come to work?
examples.ipa: /wɒt taɪm wɪl juː kʌm tə wɜːk?/
examples.ru: Во сколько ты придёшь на работу?

examples.en: What time will you come back?

sections.title: How long + will + subject + verb ...?
sections.rule: How long + will + subject + verb ...? — вопрос о длительности.

examples.en: How long will you be there?
How long will it be?
How long will it last?
How long will this meeting last?
examples.ru: Как долго будет длиться эта встреча?

examples.en: How long will one lesson last?
examples.ru: Как долго будет длиться один урок?

examples.en: How long will the meeting last?
How long will the lesson last?
